fixes_applied: tests/test.sh: rewrote v043 python tail to fix P2P_REGRESSION zero-bug — replaced 'for gid in P2P_GATING + P2P_REGRESSION: hard_zero=True' with separate p2p_failed loop over P2P_GATING only; P2P_REGRESSION ids p2p_upstream_7a8254b6 and p2p_upstream_7acb2e5a are now informational only (per CLAUDE.md). Added existing<=0 guard on f2p_any_pass zeroing. Switched to weighted-replace formula (inner_weight=max(0,1-sum(weights))) which is naturally bounded to [0,1].
notes: Pre-flagged GOOD per prior audit. Confirmed: 11 F2P gates summing to 1.00, behaviorally graded auth-fallback wiring (struct decl, impl, AdminApiAuth invocation, api-key validation primitive, fallback merchant set, settings struct, TOML config, route rewiring, AuthenticationType branch, cohesive cross-concern check). Upstream PR 7744 (+263/-108 across 5 files) — gold patch is exact. Only fix needed was the P2P_REGRESSION bug per v0.4.3.1 catalog.
